title: Annual Operating Budget: Financial Exigency
description: Conroe ISD follows a defined process for declaring a financial emergency when the district faces a serious budget shortfall that threatens its ability to operate. During such a situation, the district may take steps to reduce costs, which could include changes to programs, staffing, or services. Understanding this process helps community members know how major financial decisions are made and what protections are in place when the district's budget is under significant strain.
